server/tests/test_heic_boxes.py :: _minimal_ftyp
def _minimal_ftyp(major: bytes = b"heic", compatible: bytes = b"heic") -> bytes:
    body = major + struct.pack(">I", 0) + compatible
    size = 8 + len(body)
    return struct.pack(">I", size) + b"ftyp" + body

server/tests/test_heic_boxes.py :: test_read_box_header_for_ftyp
def test_read_box_header_for_ftyp():
    payload = _minimal_ftyp()
    header = read_box_header(payload, 0)
    assert header.box_type == b"ftyp"
    assert header.size == len(payload)

server/tests/test_heic_boxes.py :: test_is_heic_container_rejects_non_heic_ftyp
def test_is_heic_container_rejects_non_heic_ftyp():
    payload = _minimal_ftyp(major=b"mp42", compatible=b"isom")
    assert is_heic_container(payload) is False

server/tests/test_heic_boxes.py :: test_inspect_heic_container_reads_brands
def test_inspect_heic_container_reads_brands():
    payload = _minimal_ftyp()
    info = inspect_heic_container(payload)
    assert info.major_brand == "heic"
    assert "heic" in info.compatible_brands
    assert "ftyp" in info.box_types

server/tests/test_heic_boxes.py :: test_inspect_rejects_invalid_payload
def test_inspect_rejects_invalid_payload():
    with pytest.raises(HeicBoxError):
        inspect_heic_container(b"not-a-container")

server/tests/test_heic_boxes.py :: test_parse_ftyp_compatible_brands
def test_parse_ftyp_compatible_brands():
    payload = _minimal_ftyp(major=b"mif1", compatible=b"heic")
    header = read_box_header(payload, 0)
    major, brands = parse_ftyp(payload, header)
    assert major == "mif1"
    assert brands[:2] == ["mif1", "heic"]
